description: Frozen candidate-pool enumeration for the Cycle-005 held-out census (E2 step 1). SPECIFICATION-LEVEL ONLY: no provider was queried, no live metadata was inspected, no values were fetched, no candidate feed was contacted. Enumeration order is fixed and expressed explicitly by `rank`. This is NOT a census result and carries no measured aggregates; the mechanical selection rule is applied to census-measured aggregate metadata only at C-005 M4, post-freeze. Descriptors (cadence, vintage_structure) are documented specification-level characteristics transcribed from the architecture, not measured values.
provenance: architecture 2026-07-10 (grimoires/loa/research/forge-instrument-compiler-architecture-2026-07-10.md) §9:254-260; PRD FR-11b; SDD Lane L5 (07-cycle-004-sdd.md:534)
prior_exposure_check: every candidate below is documented not-in-burned-list at specification time; the binding check is gate 5 (provider-product join against the frozen lab/census/burned-list.json) evaluated mechanically at census time

candidates.notes: thesis section 23-E2 worked example. Not in burned list: USGS earthquake/seismic is a burned product, but this is a different USGS data product with a different statistical structure (provider-product granularity; residual author-familiarity recorded as a note).

Not in burned list: NOAA SWPC space-weather products are burned, but this is a different NOAA data product. Same provider identity (NOAA), different product, therefore NOT burned under the provider-product join.

Not in burned list: NOAA SWPC space-weather products are burned, but this is a different NOAA data product. Same provider identity (NOAA), different product, therefore NOT burned under the provider-product join.

candidates.endogeneity_note: Mild endogeneity flagged (arch section 9:260): electricity demand may exhibit reflexivity with market/price signals. The exogeneity gate (gate 2) records the authored judgment; this flag is carried explicitly so the mechanical selection rule and later review can weigh it.
